title: Bridge Essay: Change in Time Perception Following the Place of Pre-Existence Technique.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ultimate/Emptiness** (Phase 17) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Ultimate/Emptiness to mechanistic neuroscience through Change, in, Time, Perception, Following.

**Change in Time Perception Following the Place of Pre-Existence Technique.** — Int J Environ Res Public Health. PMID: 36834202. DOI: 10.3390/ijerph20043509. Time perception is closely related to spatial and bodily perception, yet little is known about how this interrelationship is impacted by meditation and biological sex. To examine this, we studied the effects of astepwise application of three meditation techniques, from focused attention, to open monitoring to non-dual meditation, encompassed in the Place of Pre-Existence technique (PPEt) on the subjective perception of time, space and body using apre-post research design.
